name: sufficit-vscode-symposium
description: Symposium (συμπόσιον) — host and conduct dialogue sessions with multiple AI agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot CLI) side by side inside VS Code.

commands.title: Symposium: New Persistent Session (tmux, survives close)

symposium.root.description: Local root for vendor-neutral agent knowledge (agents/skills/tools/instructions, sync state). Empty uses ~/.symposium.

symposium.hub.url.description: Base URL of the sufficit-ai memory/vault hub (e.g. https://ai.sufficit.com.br). Empty disables sync; agents still work offline from local files.

symposium.identity.url.description: Sufficit Identity (Duende) issuer URL for login.

symposium.identity.clientId.description: OAuth client id registered in Sufficit Identity for Symposium (public client with the device_code grant). Required for login.

symposium.hub.token.description: Bearer token for the sufficit-ai hub REST API.

symposium.hub.contextId.description: Optional memory context (tenant boundary) sent as X-MEMORY-CONTEXT-ID.

symposium.hub.source.description: Source system id sent as X-MEMORY-SOURCE-ID (identifies this machine/system in shared memory).

symposium.bridge.enabled.description: Enable the remote control bridge (HTTP + SSE) that re-publishes the Symposium public API for remote commands and chat following. Off by default.

symposium.bridge.host.description: Bind address for the remote bridge. Keep localhost unless fronted by an authenticated tunnel.

symposium.bridge.port.description: TCP port for the remote bridge.

symposium.bridge.token.description: Bearer token required by the remote bridge. Empty generates an ephemeral token logged to the Symposium output channel.

symposium.claude.executable.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI executable.

symposium.claude.model.description: Model passed to claude --model. Empty uses the CLI default.

symposium.claude.env.description: Extra environment variables for the Claude CLI process (e.g. ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN for a gateway).

symposium.claude.reasoning.description: Default reasoning/thinking effort for Claude terminal sessions (claude --effort). 'default' omits the flag.

symposium.codex.executable.description: Path to the Codex CLI executable.

symposium.codex.model.description: Model passed to codex exec --model. Empty uses the CLI default.

symposium.codex.reasoning.description: Default reasoning effort for Codex terminal sessions (codex -c model_reasoning_effort). 'default' omits it.

symposium.copilot.executable.description: Path to the GitHub Copilot CLI executable.

symposium.copilot.model.description: Model passed to copilot --model. Empty uses the CLI default.

symposium.copilot.reasoning.description: Default reasoning effort for Copilot terminal sessions (copilot --reasoning-effort). 'default' omits it.

symposium.adapters.markdownDescription: Extra OpenAI-compatible adapters (e.g. multiple Sufficit AI gateways). Each entry: `{ name, baseUrl, headers, apiKey, model, models }`. `id` is auto-generated (GUID) on save if omitted — keeps sessions stable when you rename. Leave `models` empty to auto-discover from `GET <baseUrl>/models`. Edit via 'Symposium: Edit Adapters (JSON)'.

id.description: Stable backend key. Auto-generated (GUID, no hyphens) on save if omitted; set manually in any format if you prefer.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

apiKey.description: Sent as Authorization: Bearer <key> when no Authorization header is set.

symposium.openai.api.description: Request type for the built-in OpenAI adapter: 'chat' (/chat/completions) or 'responses' (/responses).

symposium.openai.baseUrl.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible API (e.g. the Sufficit AI gateway).

symposium.openai.apiKey.description: API key sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' when no Authorization header is set in symposium.openai.headers.

symposium.openai.headers.description: Custom HTTP headers for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint (e.g. Authorization, x-api-key, gateway routing for Sufficit AI).

symposium.openai.model.description: Default model id. Empty uses the first of symposium.openai.models.

symposium.openai.models.description: Model ids offered in the picker (the Sufficit AI catalog).

symposium.openai.reasoning.description: Default reasoning_effort for models that support it. 'default' omits the parameter.

symposium.chat.openIn.description: Where sessions open: as a full editor panel (default, like the built-in chat sessions viewer) or in the Symposium sidebar Chat view.

symposium.chat.sessionsSide.description: Side of the sessions list inside the chat surface. 'auto' follows the dock side (sessions on the outer edge: right when docked right, left when docked left).

enumDescriptions: Queue the message and send it after the current turn (FIFO).
Interrupt the running turn and send immediately.
symposium.chat.whenBusy.description: What sending does WHILE a turn is running. When the agent is idle it always sends immediately, so this only applies when it's busy. Overridable per message with the dropdown next to the send button.
